MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-25-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-20-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-20-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SAMUEL C. LAW. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ELIAS POSADAS. DEFENDANT APPEARED IN COURT AT 3:35PM BY THEN THE HEARING WAS OVER AND PLAINTIFF HAD LEFT THE COURTROOM. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:23am
Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey Wohl; Clerk J. Kong, D525, Not Reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.

APPEARANCES:
Alison Dixon, Esq., specially appearance counsel for Appellant/Defendant Norma Margarita Molinar who is also present.
Maria Estela Murillo-Cerda appears as pro per with witness/interpreter Elias Posabas.

Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Wohl.
Counsel Dixon cross exmines respondent, Maria Estela Murillo-Derda and then examines her client Appellant Ms. Molinar.

EXHR COPY OF RESIDENCE CARD AND THE E-MAIL
EXHA CONTRACT

10:07AM
Matter is submitted. Newly unmarked evidence returned to the parties.
